signature_dialog.name: Signature Dialog
signature_dialog.route: Visit Detail > Tap 'Client Signature' accordion > Tap signature area

priority_picker.name: Priority Picker
priority_picker.route: KNOWN LIMITATION: QA-test card's Compose onClick is not reachable via adb input on 320x640 CI emulator — tried 5 gesture strategies (plain tap / long-press 150ms & 500ms / micro-swipe / search). Nav falls back to [qa]testing visit (History) which has no actions, so this baseline guards the scrolled-Actions visit_detail state. If the app ever exposes the card's onClick in accessibility, this screen will start capturing the real dialog and flag diffs.

delete_dialog.name: Delete Confirmation Dialog
delete_dialog.route: KNOWN LIMITATION: QA-test card's Compose onClick is not reachable via adb input on 320x640 CI emulator — tried 5 gesture strategies (plain tap / long-press 150ms & 500ms / micro-swipe / search). Nav falls back to [qa]testing visit (History) which has no actions, so this baseline guards the scrolled-Actions visit_detail state. If the app ever exposes the card's onClick in accessibility, this screen will start capturing the real dialog and flag diffs.

unsaved_data_dialog.name: Unsaved Data Dialog
unsaved_data_dialog.route: KNOWN LIMITATION: the back-press + type-to-trigger sequence relies on focusing a specific Description EditText that our scanner can't reliably target via find_and_tap. Nav falls back to 2x press_back from visit_detail, landing on visits_home. Baseline includes both the intended dialog elements (Unsaved data / Stay / Go back) AND the visits_home fallback state, so this screen guards against UI changes in either. If the trigger ever fires, the dialog's elements will match the original three baseline entries.
